seo.title: Web Design in Nova Scotia for Local Businesses | Hatt Digital
seo.description: I build clean, mobile-friendly websites for Nova Scotia trades and local businesses — straight pricing from $500, live in 1–3 weeks, and you own everything.

hero.eyebrow: Web design in Nova Scotia for local businesses
hero.title: A website that gets you calls, built by **someone you can actually phone.**
hero.sub: I’m Evan. I build clean, mobile first websites for contractors and local businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, and the South Shore. You get a flat quote up front, a site live in 1 to 3 weeks, and you own every piece of it.

compare.heading: Your website should make people trust you before they call.
compare.intro: Drag the slider to compare an outdated website with a clean, mobile-friendly version built for local contractors. The goal is simple: make your services clear, build trust fast, and make it easy for customers to call or request a quote.
compare.disclaimer: Example mockup, not a real client site. Built to show the standard I work toward.

work.heading: Website examples built for local trades and small businesses.
work.intro: No borrowed logos. No fake client names. These are sample websites I built to show the kind of work I can create for contractors, trades, and local businesses. Open one on your phone and see how your project could feel.

cases.alt: Toner and office supplies website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Toner Supplies Website
cases.desc: A clean demo website for an office and toner supply business, built to make browsing products and requesting a quote easier.

cases.alt: Marine services website demo built by Hatt Digital
cases.title: Marine Business Website
cases.desc: A polished demo website for a marine service business, built to organize services and make contact details easy to find.

pricing.heading: Website pricing without the runaround.
pricing.intro: Most website projects hide the price until after a call. I keep it simple. These are the ranges where most local business websites land, and every project gets a flat, all in quote before anything starts.
pricing.foot: Every quote is flat and all in. The number we agree on is the number you pay. Not sure where you fit? Tell me what you need and I’ll point you to the right option.

tiers.name: Starter Website
tiers.label: Most land between $500–$800
tiers.sub: A clean, focused one page website that gets your business online properly. Best for simple service businesses that need a strong homepage, clear contact options, and a professional mobile layout.
features: You own the domain and site

tiers.name: Business Website
tiers.label: Most land between $900–$1,500
tiers.sub: A multi-page site for service businesses that need more trust and better structure before customers reach out.
features: You own the domain and site

tiers.name: Custom Website
tiers.label: Custom quoted after scope
tiers.sub: For businesses that need more than a standard website, such as booking forms, quote flows, editable content, extra service or location pages, or custom features. I scope it with you first, then give one flat price.

local.heading: Your website, built by the person you actually talk to.
local.body1: Hatt Digital is run by Evan Hatt, right here in Nova Scotia. That means you’re not being passed between salespeople, account managers, and developers. You deal directly with the person designing, building, and launching your website.
local.body2: I work with local businesses across Halifax, Dartmouth, Bedford, the South Shore and beyond — contractors, trades, and service businesses that want a site that actually brings in work.

process.heading: Four steps. No mystery.
process.intro: You'll always know exactly where things stand and what happens next.

steps.title: Quick call
steps.text: A quick phone or video call, usually 15 minutes, so I can understand your business, what you need, and what the website should help with. No pressure.

steps.title: Plan and quote
steps.text: Within one business day, you get a flat, all in price and a real timeline. The number we agree on is the number you pay.

steps.title: Design and build
steps.text: In week one and week two, I design and build the site, you review it, and we refine it together until it feels right.

steps.title: Launch
steps.text: Most sites go live in two to three weeks total. I check everything works, show you how to run it, and stay reachable after.

cta.heading: Want a straight answer about your website?
cta.body: Send me your current site or what you need built. I’ll reply within one business day with honest advice and a flat quote — and if we work together, the domain, the site, and the content are yours from day one.
